case_title: MUSTAPHA MATH VS. CONARD HOUSE, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATH, MUSTAPHA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2022 - JUDGMENT. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE PROVIDED. PLAINTIFF MUSTAPHA MATH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, REPRESENTED BY LILIANA SAUREZ, DIRECTOR OF SUPPORTIVE HOUSING & COMMUNITY SERVICES IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATH, MUSTAPHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY MATH, MUSTAPHA AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MATH, MUSTAPHA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATH, MUSTAPHA AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LILIANA SUAREZ, DIR. OF SUPPORTIVE HOUSING & COMMUNITY SERVICES FILED BY DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC.
